    </PreviewShell>
  );
}

function StatusPill({ label }: { label: string }): React.ReactElement {
  return <span className="gallery-status-pill">{label}</span>;
}

const PREVIEW_BY_NAME: Record<string, () => React.ReactElement> = {
  ChipsButton: ButtonPreview,
  ChipsInput: InputPreview,
  ChipsCheckbox: CheckboxPreview,
  ChipsRadioGroup: RadioPreview,
  ChipsSwitch: SwitchPreview,
  ChipsSelect: SelectPreview,
  ChipsDialog: DialogPreview,
  ChipsPopover: PopoverPreview,
  ChipsTabs: TabsPreview,
  ChipsMenu: MenuPreview,
  ChipsTooltip: TooltipPreview,
  ChipsFormField: FormFieldPreview,
  ChipsFormGroup: FormGroupPreview,
  ChipsVirtualList: VirtualListPreview,
  ChipsDataGrid: DataGridPreview,
  ChipsTree: TreePreview,
  ChipsDateTime: DateTimePreview,
  ChipsCommandPalette: CommandPalettePreview,
  ChipsSplitPane: SplitPanePreview,
  ChipsDockPanel: DockPanelPreview,
  ChipsInspector: InspectorPreview,
  ChipsPanelHeader: PanelHeaderPreview,
  ChipsCardShell: CardShellPreview,
  ChipsToolWindow: ToolWindowPreview,
  ChipsErrorBoundary: ErrorBoundaryPreview,
  ChipsLoadingBoundary: LoadingBoundaryPreview,
  ChipsNotification: NotificationPreview,
  ChipsToast: ToastPreview,
  ChipsEmptyState: EmptyStatePreview,
  ChipsSkeleton: SkeletonPreview,
};

function toRegistrations(items: Array<{ name: string; scope: string; parts: string[] }>): ComponentPreviewRegistration[] {
  return items.map((item) => ({
    name: item.name,
    scope: item.scope,
    parts: item.parts,
    preview: PREVIEW_BY_NAME[item.name],
  }));
}

export const COMPONENT_GROUPS: ComponentGroup[] = [
  {
    id: "foundation",
    titleKey: "settingsPanel.gallery.groups.foundation",
    items: toRegistrations(P0_BASE_INTERACTIVE_COMPONENTS),

  {

  },
  {

import React from "react";
import { ChipsCardShell, ChipsTabs } from "@chips/component-library";
import { useI18n } from "../../app/providers/I18nProvider";
import { useRuntimeContext } from "../../app/providers/RuntimeProvider";
import { PageFrame } from "../../shared/ui/PageFrame";
import { COMPONENT_GROUPS } from "./registry";

export function ComponentGalleryPage(): React.ReactElement {
  const { t } = useI18n();
  const { currentTheme } = useRuntimeContext();

  return (
    <PageFrame
      title={t("settingsPanel.gallery.title")}
      subtitle={t("settingsPanel.gallery.subtitle", {
        theme: currentTheme?.displayName ?? t("settingsPanel.common.notAvailable"),
      })}
    >
      <div className="gallery-header-note">{t("settingsPanel.gallery.description")}</div>
      <ChipsTabs
        items={COMPONENT_GROUPS.map((group) => ({
          value: group.id,
          label: t(group.titleKey),
          content: (
            <div className="gallery-grid">
              {group.items.map((item) => {
                const Preview = item.preview;
                return (
                  <ChipsCardShell
                    key={item.name}
                    title={item.name}
                    toolbar={<span className="gallery-scope-tag">{item.scope}</span>}
                    footer={<div className="gallery-parts">{item.parts.join(" · ")}</div>}
                  >
                    <Preview />
                  </ChipsCardShell>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          ),
        }))}
      />
    </PageFrame>
  );
}
EOF]

import type { ReactElement } from "react";
import { AppPluginsPage } from "../features/app-plugins/AppPluginsPage";
import { ComponentGalleryPage } from "../features/component-gallery/ComponentGalleryPage";
import { LanguagePage } from "../features/languages/LanguagePage";
import { ThemePage } from "../features/themes/ThemePage";

export type MenuId = "themes" | "languages" | "app-plugins" | "component-gallery";

  summaryKey: string;

  render: () => ReactElement;
}

cat > 'Chips-EcoSettingsPanel/src/app/App.tsx' <<'EOF'
import React from "react";
import { ChipsThemeProvider } from "@chips/component-library";
import { appConfig } from "../../config/app-config";
import { I18nProvider, useI18n } from "./providers/I18nProvider";
import { RuntimeProvider, useRuntimeContext } from "./providers/RuntimeProvider";
import { MENU_REGISTRY, type MenuId } from "./menu-registry";
import { NotificationStack } from "../shared/ui/NotificationStack";
import { StatusBadge } from "../shared/ui/StatusBadge";

function AppShell(): React.ReactElement {
  const { t } = useI18n();
  const { currentLocale, currentTheme, eventSource, ready, runtimeError, refreshRuntimeState } = useRuntimeContext();
  const [activeMenuId, setActiveMenuId] = React.useState<MenuId>("themes");

  const activeEntry = React.useMemo(() => {
    return MENU_REGISTRY.find((entry) => entry.id === activeMenuId) ?? MENU_REGISTRY[0];
  }, [activeMenuId]);

  const feedbackItems = React.useMemo(() => {
    if (!runtimeError) {
      return [];
    }
    return [
      {
        id: runtimeError.code,
        tone: "error" as const,
        title: t("settingsPanel.feedback.runtimeErrorTitle"),
        message: runtimeError.message,
        durationMs: 0,
      },
    ];
  }, [runtimeError, t]);

  return (
    <ChipsThemeProvider
      themeId={currentTheme?.themeId ?? "chips-official.default-theme"}
      version={currentTheme?.version ?? "0.1.0"}
      eventSource={eventSource}
      eventName="theme.changed"
    >
      <div className="settings-app-shell">
        <aside className="settings-sidebar">
          <div className="settings-sidebar__brand" style={{ WebkitAppRegion: "drag" }}>
            <div className="settings-sidebar__eyebrow">{t("settingsPanel.app.eyebrow")}</div>
            <h1 className="settings-sidebar__title">{t("settingsPanel.app.title")}</h1>
            <p className="settings-sidebar__subtitle">{t("settingsPanel.app.subtitle")}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="settings-sidebar__runtime">
            <div className="settings-sidebar__runtime-row">
              <span>{t("settingsPanel.app.currentTheme")}</span>
              <StatusBadge tone="positive" label={currentTheme?.displayName ?? t("settingsPanel.common.notAvailable")} />
            </div>
            <div className="settings-sidebar__runtime-row">
              <span>{t("settingsPanel.app.currentLocale")}</span>
              <StatusBadge tone="neutral" label={currentLocale} />
            </div>
          </div>
          <nav className="settings-sidebar__nav" aria-label={t("settingsPanel.menu.ariaLabel")}>
            {MENU_REGISTRY.map((entry) => (
              <button
                key={entry.id}
                type="button"
                className={`settings-menu-item${entry.id === activeEntry.id ? " settings-menu-item--active" : ""}`}
                onClick={() => setActiveMenuId(entry.id)}
                style={{ WebkitAppRegion: "no-drag" }}
              >
                <span className="settings-menu-item__title">{t(entry.titleKey)}</span>
                <span className="settings-menu-item__summary">{t(entry.summaryKey)}</span>
              </button>
            ))}
          </nav>
        </aside>
        <main className="settings-content" style={{ WebkitAppRegion: "no-drag" }}>
          <NotificationStack ariaLabel={t("settingsPanel.feedback.ariaLabel")} items={feedbackItems} />
          {!ready ? (
            <div className="settings-content__loading">{t("settingsPanel.app.loading")}</div>
          ) : (
            activeEntry.render()
          )}
          {runtimeError ? (
            <div className="settings-content__footer-action">
              <button type="button" className="text-button" onClick={() => void refreshRuntimeState()}>
                {t("settingsPanel.app.retry")}
              </button>
            </div>
          ) : null}
        </main>
      </div>
    </ChipsThemeProvider>
  );
}

export function App(): React.ReactElement {
  return (
    <RuntimeProvider>
      <I18nProvider>
        <AppShell />
      </I18nProvider>
    </RuntimeProvider>
  );
}

export const APP_ID = appConfig.appId;
EOF

:root {
  color-scheme: light;
  font-family: "SF Pro Display", "PingFang SC", "Helvetica Neue", sans-serif;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top left, color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-primary, #0a6cff) 14%, transparent), transparent 34%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #ffffff) 96%, var(--chips-sys-color-primary, #0a6cff) 4%), var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #ffffff));
  color: var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111);
}

* {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
  margin: 0;
  min-height: 100vh;
  background: transparent;
  color: inherit;
}

button,
input,
select,
textarea {
  font: inherit;
}

#root {
  min-height: 100vh;
}

.settings-app-shell {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 300px minmax(0, 1fr);
  min-height: 100vh;
}

.settings-sidebar {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 24px;
  padding: 28px 20px 24px;
  border-right: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111) 12%, transparent);
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #ffffff) 88%, var(--chips-sys-color-primary, #0a6cff) 12%);
  backdrop-filter: blur(18px);
}

.settings-sidebar__brand {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
}

.settings-sidebar__eyebrow {
  font-size: 11px;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111) 62%, transparent);
}

.settings-sidebar__title {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 26px;
  line-height: 1.08;
}

.settings-sidebar__subtitle {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.5;
  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111) 72%, transparent);
}

.settings-sidebar__runtime {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  padding: 16px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #ffffff) 76%, transparent);
  box-shadow: 0 16px 42px color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111) 6%, transparent);
}

.settings-sidebar__runtime-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  font-size: 12px;
}

.settings-sidebar__nav {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
}

.settings-menu-item {
  display: grid;
  gap: 6px;
  padding: 14px 16px;
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111) 8%, transparent);
  border-radius: 18px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #ffffff) 78%, transparent);
  color: inherit;
  text-align: left;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: transform 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, background 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease;
}

.settings-menu-item:hover {
  transform: translateY(-1px);
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-primary, #0a6cff) 38%, transparent);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 28px color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-primary, #0a6cff) 12%, transparent);
}

.settings-menu-item--active {
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-primary, #0a6cff) 16%, var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #ffffff) 84%);
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-primary, #0a6cff) 42%, transparent);
}

.settings-menu-item__title {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.settings-menu-item__summary {
  font-size: 12px;
  line-height: 1.5;
  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111) 66%, transparent);
}

.settings-content {
  display: grid;
  gap: 18px;
  padding: 28px;
}

.settings-content__loading {
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  min-height: 300px;
  font-size: 14px;
}

.settings-content__footer-action {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.text-button {
  border: 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--chips-sys-color-primary, #0a6cff);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.page-frame {
  display: grid;
  gap: 18px;
}

.page-frame__body {
  display: grid;
  gap: 18px;
}

.control-bar {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.search-field {
  width: min(100%, 320px);
}

.drop-zone {
  display: grid;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 18px 20px;
  border: 1px dashed color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-primary, #0a6cff) 35%, transparent);
  border-radius: 20px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #ffffff) 82%, transparent);
}

.drop-zone--active {
  border-style: solid;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-primary, #0a6cff) 10%, var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #ffffff) 90%);
}

.drop-zone__title {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.drop-zone__description {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111) 64%, transparent);
}

.card-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
  gap: 16px;
}

.card-grid--compact {
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr));
}

.action-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 8px;
}

.action-row--tight {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 6px;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.meta-list {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  margin: 0;
}

.meta-list div {
  display: grid;
  gap: 4px;
}

.meta-list dt {
  font-size: 11px;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111) 58%, transparent);
}

.meta-list dd {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.5;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.card-description {
  margin: 0 0 14px;
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111) 70%, transparent);
}

.status-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  min-height: 28px;
  padding: 0 10px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 12px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #ffffff) 86%, transparent);
  border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111) 10%, transparent);
}

.status-badge__dot {
  width: 7px;
  height: 7px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: currentColor;
}

.status-badge--positive {
  color: #146c2e;
}

.status-badge--attention {
  color: #9a6700;
}

.status-badge--danger {
  color: #b3261e;
}

.status-badge--neutral {
  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111) 70%, transparent);
}

.gallery-header-note {
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.7;
  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111) 70%, transparent);
}

.gallery-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
  gap: 16px;
}

.gallery-preview {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  min-height: 132px;
  align-content: start;
}

.gallery-inline-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: 10px;
}

.gallery-scope-tag,
.gallery-status-pill,
.gallery-parts {
  font-size: 11px;
  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111) 62%, transparent);
}

.gallery-pane {
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  min-height: 84px;
  border-radius: 16px;
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #ffffff) 90%, transparent);
}

@media (max-width: 920px) {
  .settings-app-shell {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .settings-sidebar {
    border-right: 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111) 12%, transparent);
  }

  .settings-sidebar__nav {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .settings-content {
    padding: 18px;
  }

  .settings-sidebar {
    padding: 18px;
  }

  .settings-sidebar__nav {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .control-bar {
    justify-content: stretch;
  }

  .search-field {
    width: 100%;
  }
}

cat > 'Chips-EcoSettingsPanel/config/logging.ts' <<'EOF'
export type LogLevel = "debug" | "info" | "warn" | "error";

interface LoggerOptions {
  scope?: string;
}

function serialize(extra: unknown): string {
  if (extra === undefined) {
    return "";
  }
  try {
    return ` ${JSON.stringify(extra)}`;
  } catch {
    return " [unserializable]";
  }
}

export function createLogger(scope?: string) {
  const prefix = scope ? `[${scope}]` : "[eco-settings-panel]";

  function write(level: LogLevel, message: string, extra?: unknown) {
    console.log(`${prefix} ${level.toUpperCase()}: ${message}${serialize(extra)}`);
  }

  return {
    debug: (message: string, extra?: unknown) => write("debug", message, extra),
    info: (message: string, extra?: unknown) => write("info", message, extra),
    warn: (message: string, extra?: unknown) => write("warn", message, extra),
    error: (message: string, extra?: unknown) => write("error", message, extra),
  };
}

export function createScopedLogger(options: LoggerOptions) {
  return createLogger(options.scope);
}
EOF

node - <<'EOF'

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell"><details>

cat > '项目日志与笔记/工单027-SETTINGS-PANEL-TYPESCRIPT-INTEGRATION-BASELINE-GAP/任务说明.md' <<'EOF'
# 工单027：生态设置面板正式开发遇到 TypeScript 集成基线缺口

## 1. 背景

在继续推进 `Chips-EcoSettingsPanel` 正式开发时，已经按设计原稿、生态共用技术文档与当前 Host/SDK 契约开始把脚手架示例替换为正式设置面板实现。

本轮实现严格使用：

- React
- `chips-sdk`
- `@chips/component-library`
- 严格 TypeScript 模式（工程 `tsconfig.json` 已启用 `strict`）

在把页面、服务适配层、主题/多语言/插件治理逻辑接入正式工程后，对项目执行 TypeScript 编译校验时，发现当前生态基础能力仍存在两个正式阻断点，导致设置面板无法在“不降级类型检查、不写本地临时声明、不绕过正式组件接入”的前提下继续完成交付。

## 2. 阻断结论

当前阻断点包括：

1. `@chips/component-library` 缺少正式 TypeScript 类型声明；
2. `chips-sdk` 对外 `Client` 类型定义自身存在属性冲突，导致严格 TS 工程无法通过编译。

这两个问题都属于生态级基线缺口，不是设置面板业务层可以合法兜底的问题。

如果继续开发，将不可避免落入以下违规路径之一：

- 在设置面板项目本地补写 `declare module '@chips/component-library'` 之类的临时声明；
- 在业务代码中大量 `as any` 降级；
- 绕过 `chips-sdk` 的正式类型体系直接退回弱类型 Bridge 调用；
- 关闭严格 TS 或绕过类型门禁。

以上都不符合当前仓库规则，因此本工单视为正式阻断项。

## 3. 证据

### 3.1 组件库缺少正式类型声明

执行命令：

```bash
npm --workspace Chips-EcoSettingsPanel exec tsc --noEmit
```

出现错误：

- `Could not find a declaration file for module '@chips/component-library'`

当前解析到的包入口为：

- `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-ComponentLibrary/packages/component-library/index.js`

但该包没有正式 `.d.ts` 导出，也没有在 `package.json` 中提供类型入口。

这意味着生态要求“前端使用 React + 薯片组件库 + strict TypeScript”目前无法正式同时满足。

### 3.2 SDK Client 类型定义存在属性冲突

同一次编译中还出现：

- `Interface 'Client' incorrectly extends interface 'CoreClient'`

具体文件：

- `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-SDK/src/types/client.ts`

当前 `CoreClient` 中定义：

- `config: Readonly<ClientConfig>`

而 `Client` 又追加了：

- `config: import("../api/config").ConfigApi`

这两个 `config` 含义完全不同：

1. 一个是 SDK 客户端初始化配置；
2. 一个是 Host `config.*` 服务域 API。

结果是 `Client extends CoreClient` 在类型层面天然冲突，任何严格 TS 工程只要消费该定义，就会在编译期失败。

### 3.3 设置面板当前开发被直接阻断

在 `Chips-EcoSettingsPanel` 中，已经开始按正式架构接入：

- 应用壳层
- 主题治理页
- 多语言页
- 应用插件页
- 组件展示页
- 本地 i18n 资源与 Runtime Provider

但由于上面两个生态缺口，工程无法通过正式 TypeScript 校验，因此不能继续宣称“高质量完成正式开发”。

## 4. 影响范围

- `Chips-EcoSettingsPanel` 无法继续在严格 TS 与正式组件库/SDK 接入约束下完成开发。
- 所有新的 React + TypeScript 应用插件工程，只要正式依赖 `@chips/component-library` 与 `chips-sdk`，都可能遇到相同问题。
- 这不是设置面板单项目问题，而是生态前端工程基线问题。

## 5. 复现步骤

1. 在生态根工作区进入 `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EcoSettingsPanel`。
2. 按正式方式在源码中引入 `@chips/component-library` 与 `chips-sdk`。
3. 执行：
   ```bash
   npm --workspace Chips-EcoSettingsPanel exec tsc --noEmit
   ```
4. 观察编译失败，包含：
   - 组件库缺少声明文件；
   - SDK `Client` / `CoreClient` 类型冲突。

## 6. 期望行为

- `@chips/component-library` 必须正式提供完整、可发布、可被 TS 工程消费的类型声明；
- `chips-sdk` 必须修复 `Client` 与 `CoreClient` 的类型冲突，明确区分 SDK 初始化配置与 Host `config.*` 服务域 API；
- 生态标准应用插件在 `strict` 模式下接入 React + SDK + 组件库后，应能直接通过 `tsc --noEmit`。

## 7. 建议处理方向

### 7.1 组件库

- 为 `@chips/component-library` 正式补齐类型产物；
- `package.json` 中提供明确的 `types`/`exports.types` 入口；
- 确保聚合包导出的所有组件、元数据与 helper 都有可消费类型。

### 7.2 SDK

需要重新命名或拆分当前冲突字段，避免：

- `CoreClient.config`（客户端初始化配置）
- `Client.config`（Host `config.*` 领域 API）

共享同一属性名。

最终方案应保持正式、清晰、无兼容包袱，而不是在业务层绕过去。

## 8. 当前处理决定

根据仓库规范：

- 已登记本工单；
- 立即停止继续推进 `Chips-EcoSettingsPanel` 的正式开发；
- 不在设置面板工程中添加任何本地临时声明或 `any` 降级处理；
- 等待组件库与 SDK 的正式基线问题处理完成后，再继续当前任务。

## 9. 影响文件

- `项目日志与笔记/问题工单.md`
- `项目日志与笔记/工单027-SETTINGS-PANEL-TYPESCRIPT-INTEGRATION-BASELINE-GAP/任务说明.md`
EOF

export interface ThemeRuntimeState {

  addEventListener?(eventName: string, handler: (event: Event | CustomEvent<unknown>) => void): void;
  removeEventListener?(eventName: string, handler: (event: Event | CustomEvent<unknown>) => void): void;
  subscribe?(eventName: string, handler: (payload: unknown) => void): (() => void) | void;
}

  chunkSize: number;
  appliedCount: number;
  totalCount: number;
}

export interface ApplyThemeVariablesOptions {

}

}

}

  children?: React.ReactNode;
}

): () => void;

  options?: ApplyThemeVariablesOptions,
): Promise<ApplyThemeVariablesResult>;
export function ChipsThemeProvider(props: ChipsThemeProviderProps): React.ReactElement;
export function useTokenResolver(): TokenResolver;
export function useToken<T = unknown>(tokenKey: string): T;
export function useComponentTokens(componentScope: string): Record<string, unknown>;
export function useThemeRuntime(): ThemeRuntimeState;

import * as React from "react";

export interface StandardError {
  code: string;
  message: string;
  details?: unknown;
  retryable?: boolean;
}

export interface CardCoverFrameProps {
  cardId?: string;
  cardName?: string;
  coverUrl?: string;
  ratio?: string;
  loading?: boolean;
  disabled?: boolean;
  sandbox?: string;
  onOpenCard?: (cardId?: string) => void;
  onFrameReady?: (cardId?: string) => void;
  onFrameError?: (error: StandardError) => void;
}

export interface CompositeCardWindowReadyPayload {
  cardId: string;
  nodeCount: number;
}

export interface CompositeCardWindowNodeErrorPayload {
  nodeId: string;
  error: StandardError;
}

export interface CompositeCardWindowProps {
  cardFile: string;
  frameUrl?: string;
  mode?: CompositeWindowModeValue;
  loading?: boolean;
  disabled?: boolean;
  sandbox?: string;
  allowedOrigins?: string[];
  onReady?: (payload: CompositeCardWindowReadyPayload) => void;
  onNodeError?: (payload: CompositeCardWindowNodeErrorPayload) => void;
  onFatalError?: (error: StandardError) => void;
}

export interface CardCoverFrameStateInput {
  coverUrl?: string;
  frameStatus?: string;
  loading?: boolean;
  disabled?: boolean;
  loadError?: unknown;
}

export interface CompositeCardWindowStateInput {
  disabled?: boolean;
  fatalError?: unknown;
  nodeErrorCount?: number;
  loading?: boolean;
  phase?: string;
}

export interface CompositeFrameReadyMessage {
  type: "ready";
  cardId: string;
  nodeCount: number;
}

export interface CompositeFrameNodeErrorMessage {
  type: "node-error";
  nodeId: string;
  error: StandardError;
}

export interface CompositeFrameFatalErrorMessage {
  type: "fatal-error";
  error: StandardError;
}

export type CompositeFrameMessage =
  | CompositeFrameReadyMessage
  | CompositeFrameNodeErrorMessage
  | CompositeFrameFatalErrorMessage;

export interface CardDisplayAdapter {
  resolveCoverFrame(input: {
    cardId?: string;
    cardFile?: string;
    cardName?: string;
    signal?: AbortSignal;
  }): Promise<{ cardId?: string; cardName?: string; coverUrl: string }>;
  resolveCompositeWindow(input: {
    cardFile: string;
    mode: CompositeWindowModeValue;
    signal?: AbortSignal;
  }): Promise<{ cardId?: string; frameUrl: string; nodeCount?: number }>;
}

export const CompositeWindowMode: {
  readonly VIEW: "view";
  readonly PREVIEW: "preview";
};
export type CompositeWindowModeValue = (typeof CompositeWindowMode)[keyof typeof CompositeWindowMode];

export const CardDisplayAdapterMethod: {
  readonly RESOLVE_COVER_FRAME: "resolveCoverFrame";
  readonly RESOLVE_COMPOSITE_WINDOW: "resolveCompositeWindow";
};

export const COMPOSITE_FRAME_CHANNEL: "chips.composite";
export const CompositeFrameEventType: {
  readonly READY: "ready";
  readonly NODE_ERROR: "node-error";
  readonly FATAL_ERROR: "fatal-error";
};

export function CardCoverFrame(props: CardCoverFrameProps): React.ReactElement;
export function CompositeCardWindow(props: CompositeCardWindowProps): React.ReactElement;
export function resolveCardCoverFrameState(input: CardCoverFrameStateInput): string;
export function resolveCompositeCardWindowState(input: CompositeCardWindowStateInput): string;
export function toStandardError(error: unknown, fallbackCode: string): StandardError;
export function parseCompositeFrameMessage(data: unknown): CompositeFrameMessage | null;
export function validateCardDisplayAdapter(adapter: CardDisplayAdapter): true;
export function loadCoverFrameData(
  adapter: CardDisplayAdapter,
  input: { cardId?: string; cardFile?: string; cardName?: string },
  options?: { signal?: AbortSignal },
): Promise<{ cardId: string; cardName: string; coverUrl: string }>;
export function loadCompositeWindowData(
  adapter: CardDisplayAdapter,
  input: { cardFile: string; mode?: CompositeWindowModeValue },
  options?: { signal?: AbortSignal },
): Promise<{ cardId: string; frameUrl: string; nodeCount: number }>;
export function resolveIframeSandboxPolicy(sandbox?: string): string;
export function isAllowedFrameOrigin(origin: string, allowedOrigins?: string[]): boolean;

```diff
+import test from "node:test";
+import assert from "node:assert/strict";
+import * as aggregate from "../index.js";
+import { toStandardError as toComponentStandardError } from "@chips/components";
+import { toStandardError as toCardRuntimeStandardError } from "@chips/card-runtime";
+
+test("component-library aggregate exports the formal package surface", () => {
+  assert.equal(typeof aggregate.ChipsThemeProvider, "function");
+  assert.equal(typeof aggregate.ChipsButton, "function");
+  assert.equal(typeof aggregate.CardCoverFrame, "function");
+  assert.equal(typeof aggregate.CompositeCardWindow, "function");
+  assert.equal(typeof aggregate.loadCompositeWindowData, "function");
+  assert.equal(typeof aggregate.validateCardDisplayAdapter, "function");
+});
+
+test("component-library aggregate resolves helper name collisions through explicit aliases", () => {
+  assert.equal("toStandardError" in aggregate, false);
+  assert.equal(aggregate.toComponentStandardError, toComponentStandardError);
+  assert.equal(aggregate.toCardRuntimeStandardError, toCardRuntimeStandardError);
+});
```

+import path from "node:path";
+import { spawnSync } from "node:child_process";
+import { createRequire } from "node:module";
+import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";
+
+const root = path.resolve(path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)), "..");
+const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);
+const tscPath = require.resolve("typescript/bin/tsc");
+const projectPath = path.join(root, "tests", "types", "tsconfig.json");
+
+const result = spawnSync(process.execPath, [tscPath, "--project", projectPath], {
+  cwd: root,
+  stdio: "inherit"
+});
+
+process.exit(result.status ?? 1);
```

```diff
+import { ChipsButton, ChipsThemeProvider, CompositeWindowMode, type CardDisplayAdapter, loadCompositeWindowData, toCardRuntimeStandardError, toComponentStandardError } from "@chips/component-library";
+
+const adapter: CardDisplayAdapter = {
+  async resolveCoverFrame(input) {
+    return {
+      cardId: input.cardId ?? "demo-card",
+      cardName: input.cardName ?? "Demo Card",
+      coverUrl: "https://example.com/cover.html"
+    };
+  },
+  async resolveCompositeWindow(input) {
+    return {
+      cardId: input.cardFile,
+      frameUrl: "https://example.com/frame.html",
+      nodeCount: input.mode === CompositeWindowMode.VIEW ? 1 : 2
+    };
+  }
+};
+
+void loadCompositeWindowData(adapter, {
+  cardFile: "/cards/demo.card",
+  mode: CompositeWindowMode.VIEW
+});
+
+// @ts-expect-error composite window mode must remain within the formal contract
+void loadCompositeWindowData(adapter, {
+  cardFile: "/cards/demo.card",
+  mode: "edit"
+});
+
+const componentError = toComponentStandardError(new Error("component"));
+const runtimeError = toCardRuntimeStandardError(new Error("runtime"));
+
+export const smokeTree = (
+  <ChipsThemeProvider themeId="chips-official.default-theme" version="1.0.0">
+    <ChipsButton
+      variant="primary"
+      onPress={() => {
+        console.log(componentError.code, runtimeError.code);
+      }}
+    >
+      Save
+    </ChipsButton>
+  </ChipsThemeProvider>
+);
```

**Update: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/生态共用技术文档/组件库/01-组件库对外使用总览.md`**

```diff
@@
 官方统一接入包名为 `@chips/component-library`。该包是组件库聚合入口，正式聚合：
 
 - `@chips/hooks`
 - `@chips/components`
 - `@chips/card-runtime`
+
+正式 TypeScript 工程必须直接消费这些包自带的声明文件：
+
+- 聚合入口 `@chips/component-library` 已正式发布 `types` / `exports.types`
+- 子包 `@chips/hooks`、`@chips/components`、`@chips/card-runtime` 已同步提供声明入口
+- 禁止在业务工程本地补写 `declare module '@chips/component-library'`
@@
 ## 5. 常见接口
@@
 - `CompositeCardWindow`（复合卡片 iframe 窗口组件）
+
+聚合入口中若出现跨子包同名 helper 冲突，必须通过正式别名导出解决，不允许让业务层自行猜测运行时导出结果。当前已明确：
+
+- `toComponentStandardError`
+- `toCardRuntimeStandardError`
```

**Update: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/生态共用技术文档/组件库/04-组件库接入指南.md`**

```diff
@@
 3. 优先接入 P0 核心组件，再扩展高级组件
 4. 新项目不包含历史迁移策略
 
 ## 3. 标准接入步骤
@@
 4. 对齐主题权重与查找链（`global -> app -> box -> composite-card -> base-card -> component`，高权重优先回退）
 5. 跑完契约测试、a11y、性能测试
 6. 通过后合并到 `develop`
+
+TypeScript 接入基线：
+
+- 必须保持 `strict` 打开
+- 必须直接使用组件库正式声明文件
+- 禁止在应用侧添加本地声明兜底、`as any` 降级或关闭类型门禁
+- 如果组件库缺少正式声明或导出冲突，必须先提交工单再处理
```

 ## 4. 变更边界控制
 
 - 组件 API 变更必须同步更新契约文档和升级说明
 - token key 变更必须提供映射表和变更脚本
 - 任何破坏性变更必须走 major 版本策略
 - 禁止跨包直接复制逻辑，公共能力必须上提到独立包
+- 聚合包如遇跨子包同名导出冲突，必须在聚合层显式命名并补充测试，不允许依赖 `export *` 的歧义行为

**Update: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-ComponentLibrary/技术文档/08-开发者接入指南.md`**

```diff
@@
 ## 3. 基础接入步骤
 
 1. 引入组件库 Provider 与主题上下文
 2. 在页面根节点挂载主题作用域标识（如 `data-chips-app`）
 3. 使用组件库组件替换自建基础控件
 4. 使用标准 hooks 接入主题/i18n/config
 5. 完成契约测试与 a11y 验证
+
+TypeScript 正式约束：
+
+- 推荐统一从 `@chips/component-library` 导入公共 UI 能力
+- 卡片显示适配器相关类型的主定义仍以 `@chips/card-runtime` 为准
+- 业务层禁止补写本地 `declare module` 兜底组件库类型
+- 如需消费标准错误 helper，同名能力应使用聚合包的显式别名：
+  - `toComponentStandardError`
+  - `toCardRuntimeStandardError`
@@
 ```tsx
 import { ChipsThemeProvider, ChipsButton, ChipsInput, useToken } from '@chips/component-library';
@@
 ```
+
+卡片显示适配器也可以直接通过聚合包消费：
+
+```ts
+import type { CardDisplayAdapter } from "@chips/component-library";
+import { CompositeWindowMode, loadCompositeWindowData } from "@chips/component-library";
+```
@@
 - 复合卡片消息事件建议传入 `allowedOrigins`，按 origin 白名单过滤 iframe 消息来源。
 - 调用方不重复实现基础卡片分发、模板编译和 iframe 拼接。
+- `CardDisplayAdapter`、`CompositeWindowMode`、`loadCoverFrameData`、`loadCompositeWindowData` 已具备正式声明文件，可直接用于 strict TS 工程。
```

**Update: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-ComponentLibrary/技术文档/15-基础卡片插件与SDK显示链路规范.md`**

```diff
@@
 在真实 SDK 未交付前，组件库通过适配器契约保持可开发状态：
 
 - `resolveCoverFrame({ cardId, cardFile, cardName, signal })`
 - `resolveCompositeWindow({ cardFile, mode, signal })`
+
+正式类型入口：
+
+- 主定义入口：`@chips/card-runtime`
+- 聚合转发入口：`@chips/component-library`
+- 允许直接消费的类型/常量包括：
+  - `CardDisplayAdapter`
+  - `CompositeWindowMode`
+  - `loadCoverFrameData`
+  - `loadCompositeWindowData`
+  - `validateCardDisplayAdapter`
@@
 ## 7. 质量与兼容要求
 
 - 基础卡片插件必须通过 manifest 与契约校验。
 - SDK 显示接口跨应用行为必须一致。
 - 单插件失败不得拖垮复合窗口整体展示。
-- 接口升级需保持向后兼容或提供升级方案。
+- 当前首版阶段不为历史口径保留兼容层；接口调整必须先在生态级文档中完成收口，再统一落地。
```

-- `npm run quality:gate`：`lint/typecheck/test/test:contracts/test:a11y/test:perf/build` 聚合阻断

 - `npm run typecheck`

 - iframe 沙箱策略测试必须通过

+## 10. 处理结果
+
+状态：已解决（2026-03-11）
+
+### 10.1 组件库正式类型发布已闭环
+
+已在 `Chips-ComponentLibrary` 内完成正式类型面收口：
+
+- 为 `@chips/component-library`、`@chips/components`、`@chips/hooks`、`@chips/card-runtime` 明确补齐 `types` / `exports.types`
+- 为聚合包新增 `index.d.ts`
+- 为 `@chips/components`、`@chips/hooks`、`@chips/card-runtime` 提供正式声明入口
+- 为聚合包补充运行时导出测试与类型冒烟测试，不再允许业务层本地声明兜底
+
+同时对聚合层同名 helper 冲突进行了正式命名收口：
+
+- `toComponentStandardError`
+- `toCardRuntimeStandardError`
+
+避免业务层依赖 `export *` 的歧义导出结果。
+
+### 10.2 SDK Client 类型冲突已修复
+
+已在 `Chips-SDK` 中将 Core Client 的初始化配置快照字段由：
+
+- `config: Readonly<ClientConfig>`
+
+正式调整为：
+
+- `clientConfig: Readonly<ClientConfig>`
+
+这样：
+
+- `client.config.*` 继续保持 Host `config.*` 服务域 API 语义
+- `client.clientConfig` 明确表示 SDK 客户端初始化配置快照
+
+本次处理没有添加兼容别名，也没有在业务层绕过类型系统。
+
+### 10.3 文档与质量门禁已同步
+
+已同步更新：
+
+- 生态共用组件库接入文档
+- 应用插件开发文档
+- 组件库仓库内部包设计、接入指南、卡片显示链路、测试策略、发布检查清单
+- SDK Core Client 设计文档
+
+组件库质量门禁已新增 `test:types`，并接入：
+
+- `npm --workspace Chips-ComponentLibrary run verify`
+- `npm --workspace Chips-ComponentLibrary run quality:gate`
+

+
+已完成以下正式验证：

+npm --workspace Chips-EcoSettingsPanel exec tsc --noEmit

+
+- `Chips-EcoSettingsPanel` 严格 TypeScript 编译通过
+- 组件库类型发布与质量门禁通过
+- SDK 测试通过
+- Host 测试通过

 import React from "react";
 import type { FeedbackItem } from "../ui/NotificationStack";
 
+let feedbackSequence = 0;
+
+function createFeedbackId(): string {
+  feedbackSequence += 1;
+  return `feedback-${feedbackSequence}`;
+}
+
 export function useFeedbackQueue() {
   const [items, setItems] = React.useState<FeedbackItem[]>([]);
 
   const push = React.useCallback((item: Omit<FeedbackItem, "id">) => {
     setItems((current) => [
       ...current,
       {
         ...item,
-        id: `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(16).slice(2)}`,
+        id: createFeedbackId(),
       } as FeedbackItem,
     ]);
   }, []);
 
+  const remove = React.useCallback((id: string) => {
+    setItems((current) => current.filter((item) => item.id !== id));
+  }, []);
+
   const clear = React.useCallback(() => {
     setItems([]);
   }, []);
 
   return {
     items,
     push,
+    remove,
     clear,
   };
 }

+          publisher: "Chips",
+          isDefault: false,
+        },
+      },
+      {
+        id: "theme.disabled",
+        type: "theme",
+        name: "Disabled Theme",
+        version: "0.9.0",
+        installPath: "/plugins/disabled",
+        installedAt: 30,
+        enabled: false,
+        capabilities: [],
+        theme: {
+          themeId: "chips.disabled",
+          displayName: "Disabled Theme",
+          publisher: "Archive",
+          isDefault: false,
+        },
+      },
+    ] as never);
+    vi.mocked(client.theme.list).mockResolvedValue([
+      { id: "chips.current", displayName: "Current Theme", version: "1.0.0", isDefault: true },
+      { id: "chips.enabled", displayName: "Enabled Theme", version: "1.1.0", isDefault: false },
+    ] as never);
+    vi.mocked(client.theme.getCurrent).mockResolvedValue({
+      themeId: "chips.current",
+      displayName: "Current Theme",
+      version: "1.0.0",
+    } as never);
+
+    const service = new SettingsRuntimeService(client);
+    const themes = await service.listThemes();
+
+    expect(themes.map((theme) => theme.themeId)).toEqual(["chips.current", "chips.enabled", "chips.disabled"]);
+    expect(themes[0]).toMatchObject({
+      pluginId: "theme.current",
+      current: true,
+      enabled: true,
+      isDefault: true,
+      publisher: "Chips",
+    });
+    expect(themes[1]).toMatchObject({
+      pluginId: "theme.enabled",
+      current: false,
+      enabled: true,
+    });
+    expect(themes[2]).toMatchObject({
+      pluginId: "theme.disabled",
+      current: false,
+      enabled: false,
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("builds localized language governance records", async () => {
+    const client = createClientMock();
+    vi.mocked(client.i18n.listLocales).mockResolvedValue(["zh-CN", "en-US"]);
+    vi.mocked(client.i18n.getCurrent).mockResolvedValue("en-US");
+
+    const service = new SettingsRuntimeService(client);
+    const languages = await service.listLanguages("zh-CN");
+
+    expect(languages).toHaveLength(2);
+    expect(languages[0]).toMatchObject({
+      locale: "zh-CN",
+      current: false,
+    });
+    expect(languages[1]).toMatchObject({
+      locale: "en-US",
+      current: true,
+    });
+    expect(languages[0].displayName.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
+    expect(languages[1].nativeName.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
+  });
+
+  it("sorts enabled app plugins ahead of disabled ones", async () => {
+    const client = createClientMock();
+    vi.mocked(client.plugin.query).mockResolvedValue([
+      {
+        id: "app.disabled",
+        type: "app",
+        name: "Beta Tools",
+        version: "1.0.0",
+        description: "Disabled",
+        enabled: false,
+        installPath: "/plugins/beta",
+        installedAt: 1,
+        capabilities: ["beta"],
+      },
+      {
+        id: "app.enabled",
+        type: "app",
+        name: "Alpha Tools",
+        version: "2.0.0",
+        description: "Enabled",
+        enabled: true,
+        installPath: "/plugins/alpha",
+        installedAt: 2,
+        capabilities: ["alpha"],
+      },
+    ] as never);
+
+    const service = new SettingsRuntimeService(client);
+    const plugins = await service.listAppPlugins();
+
+    expect(plugins.map((plugin) => plugin.pluginId)).toEqual(["app.enabled", "app.disabled"]);
+    expect(plugins[0].capabilities).toEqual(["alpha"]);
+    expect(plugins[1].capabilities).toEqual(["beta"]);
+  });
+
+  it("opens the plugin file dialog through the formal Host action", async () => {
+    const client = createClientMock();
+    vi.mocked(client.invoke).mockResolvedValue({
+      filePaths: ["/packages/demo.cpk"],
+    });
+
+    const service = new SettingsRuntimeService(client);
+    const paths = await service.openPluginFileDialog("theme", {
+      title: "Install theme package",
+      filterName: "Theme package",
+    });
+
+    expect(paths).toEqual(["/packages/demo.cpk"]);
+    expect(client.invoke).toHaveBeenCalledWith("platform.dialogOpenFile", {
+      options: {
+        title: "Install theme package",
+        properties: ["openFile", "openDirectory"],
+        filters: [
+          {
+            name: "Theme package",
+            extensions: ["cpk", "yaml", "yml", "json"],
+          },
+        ],
+      },
+    });

```diff
+import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
+import { DEFAULT_LOCALE, formatMessage, getSupportedLocales, resolveLocale } from "../../src/shared/i18n/messages";
+
+describe("i18n messages", () => {
+  it("falls back to the default locale when an unsupported locale is requested", () => {
+    expect(resolveLocale("fr-FR")).toBe(DEFAULT_LOCALE);
+    expect(resolveLocale(undefined)).toBe(DEFAULT_LOCALE);
+  });
+
+  it("formats localized messages with parameter substitution", () => {
+    expect(
+      formatMessage("zh-CN", "settingsPanel.themes.feedback.switchSuccess", {
+        name: "暗夜主题",
+      }),
+    ).toBe("已切换到 暗夜主题。");
+  });
+
+  it("returns key placeholders for missing messages", () => {
+    expect(formatMessage("en-US", "settingsPanel.missing.key")).toBe("[[settingsPanel.missing.key]]");
+  });
+
+  it("exposes the supported locale list", () => {
+    expect(getSupportedLocales()).toEqual(["zh-CN", "en-US"]);
+  });
+});
```

+import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
+import { normalizeSettingsError } from "../../src/shared/runtime/errors";
+
+describe("normalizeSettingsError", () => {
+  it("preserves standard error-like objects", () => {
+    expect(
+      normalizeSettingsError(
+        {
+          code: "PLUGIN_INSTALL_FAILED",
+          message: "install failed",
+          retryable: true,
+          details: { pluginId: "demo" },
+        },
+        "fallback",
+      ),
+    ).toEqual({
+      code: "PLUGIN_INSTALL_FAILED",
+      message: "install failed",
+      retryable: true,
+      details: { pluginId: "demo" },
+    });
+  });
+
+  it("normalizes Error instances", () => {
+    expect(normalizeSettingsError(new Error("boom"), "fallback")).toEqual({
+      code: "UNKNOWN_ERROR",
+      message: "boom",
+      retryable: false,
+    });
+  });
+});
```

```diff
+import { describe, expect, it } from "vitest";
+import {
+  P0_BASE_INTERACTIVE_COMPONENTS,
+  P0_DATA_FORM_COMPONENTS,
+  STAGE7_DATA_ADVANCED_COMPONENTS,
+  STAGE7_WORKBENCH_COMPONENTS,
+  STAGE8_SYSTEM_UX_COMPONENTS,
+} from "@chips/component-library";
+import { COMPONENT_GROUPS } from "../../src/features/component-gallery/registry";
+
+describe("component gallery registry", () => {
+  it("covers every formal component group with a preview registration", () => {
+    const expectedGroupSizes = [
+      P0_BASE_INTERACTIVE_COMPONENTS.length,
+      P0_DATA_FORM_COMPONENTS.length,
+      STAGE7_DATA_ADVANCED_COMPONENTS.length,
+      STAGE7_WORKBENCH_COMPONENTS.length,
+      STAGE8_SYSTEM_UX_COMPONENTS.length,
+    ];
+
+    expect(COMPONENT_GROUPS).toHaveLength(expectedGroupSizes.length);
+    expect(COMPONENT_GROUPS.map((group) => group.items.length)).toEqual(expectedGroupSizes);
+  });
+
+  it("assigns a preview renderer to every registered component", () => {
+    for (const group of COMPONENT_GROUPS) {
+      for (const item of group.items) {
+        expect(item.name).toBeTruthy();
+        expect(item.scope).toBeTruthy();
+        expect(item.parts.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
+        expect(typeof item.preview).toBe("function");
+      }
+    }
+  });
+});
```

**Update: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EcoSettingsPanel/技术文档/01-应用架构与模块边界设计.md`**

```diff
@@
-建议在正式开发阶段将 `src/` 组织为如下结构：
+当前实现已将 `src/` 组织为如下结构：
 
 ```text
 src/
 ├─ app/                 # 应用壳层、Provider、菜单注册、全局布局
 ├─ features/
@@
 │  ├─ languages/
 │  ├─ app-plugins/
 │  └─ component-gallery/
-├─ services/            # Host/SDK 适配器与 DTO 映射
 ├─ shared/
 │  ├─ ui/
 │  ├─ hooks/
 │  ├─ i18n/
-│  ├─ theme/
-│  └─ utils/
+│  └─ runtime/          # Host/SDK 适配器、错误归一、事件源
 └─ test-support/
 ```
@@
 ### 3.2 功能模块
 
-每个一级菜单是一个独立功能模块，内部再拆成：
-
-- `components/`：页面组件与交互片段
-- `hooks/`：本功能的查询、变更、事件订阅
-- `model/`：视图模型、状态变换、排序过滤逻辑
-- `services/`：本功能依赖的适配器组合
+每个一级菜单是一个独立功能模块。当前实现采用“页面组件 + 专属治理 hook”组合：
+
+- `ThemePage.tsx` / `useThemeGovernance.ts`
+- `LanguagePage.tsx` / `useLanguageGovernance.ts`
+- `AppPluginsPage.tsx` / `useAppPluginGovernance.ts`
+- `ComponentGalleryPage.tsx` / `registry.tsx`
+
+这样做的原因是首版功能规模仍可控，但读取、变更、事件刷新逻辑已经与页面结构分离，后续如果单个模块复杂度继续上升，再向 `model/` 或更细粒度的 `components/` 细分。
@@
 ### 3.3 服务适配层
 
-服务适配层只负责把 Host / SDK 的原始响应映射成页面可消费的模型，例如：
+服务适配层位于 `src/shared/runtime/settings-runtime-service.ts`，只负责把 Host / SDK 的原始响应映射成页面可消费的模型，例如：
@@
 ### 3.4 共享基础层
 
 - 通用空状态、错误态、加载态组件。
 - 拖拽安装区域、操作确认对话框、列表骨架等可复用 UI。
 - 公共 hooks，例如事件订阅、异步状态管理、Host 错误归一化。
+- 反馈队列与通知栈统一由 `useFeedbackQueue` + `NotificationStack` 管理，避免每个页面自行拼装消息状态。
@@
 不允许修改多个页面组件中的 if/else 分支来“追加一个新菜单”。
+
+## 6. 源码基线约束
+
+- 正式源码只保留 TypeScript / TSX 文件。
+- 脚手架或转译过程中遗留的同名 `.js` 副本必须移出主源码目录，统一归档到 `归档/`。
+- 测试、构建、联调全部以 TypeScript 源码为唯一基线。
```

**Update: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EcoSettingsPanel/技术文档/03-运行时数据流与接口映射设计.md`**

```diff
@@
 ## 4. 文件安装流程
 
 文件选择与拖拽安装必须遵循正式治理契约：
 
 - 文件对话框调用 `platform.dialogOpenFile`；
@@
 - 页面只负责解析用户输入来源，不负责自行解包或扫描插件包；
 - 安装结果刷新时以 Host 返回的运行时记录为准，不以本地临时状态伪造成功结果。
+
+当前实现落地方式：
+
+- `SettingsRuntimeService.openPluginFileDialog()` 统一发起 `platform.dialogOpenFile`
+- 页面层通过 i18n 传入对话框标题与过滤器名称
+- 拖拽安装只负责把 `File` 交给 `platform.getPathForFile()` 解析，再复用相同安装入口
@@
 事件处理必须幂等，不能因为重复事件造成列表重复插入或状态错乱。
+
+当前实现约束：
+
+- 页面级刷新统一走 `useHostRefresh()`
+- 主题页监听：`theme.changed`、`plugin.installed`、`plugin.uninstalled`
+- 语言页监听：`language.changed`
+- 应用插件页监听：`plugin.installed`、`plugin.enabled`、`plugin.disabled`、`plugin.uninstalled`
@@
 页面层只依赖归一化错误，不直接读取散落的原始异常对象字段。
+
+应用壳层中的 Host 启动期错误同样必须走统一错误结构，不允许直接把英文异常字符串泄漏到 UI。
```

  STAGE8_SYSTEM_UX_COMPONENTS,
} from "@chips/component-library";
import { useI18n } from "../../app/providers/I18nProvider";

export interface ComponentPreviewRegistration {
  name: string;
  scope: string;
  parts: string[];
  summaryKey: string;
  emphasis: "hero" | "wide" | "standard";
  preview: () => React.ReactElement;
}

export interface ComponentGroup {
  id: string;
  titleKey: string;
  descriptionKey: string;
  items: ComponentPreviewRegistration[];
}

interface ComponentCatalogItem {
  name: string;
  scope: string;
  parts: string[];
}

function PreviewShell({ children }: React.PropsWithChildren): React.ReactElement {
  return <div className="gallery-preview">{children}</div>;
}

function ButtonPreview(): React.ReactElement {
  const { t } = useI18n();
  return (
    <PreviewShell>
      <ChipsButton>{t("settingsPanel.gallery.preview.button.action")}</ChipsButton>
    </PreviewShell>
  );
}

function toRegistrations(items: ComponentCatalogItem[]): ComponentPreviewRegistration[] {
  return items.map((item) => ({
    name: item.name,
    scope: item.scope,
    parts: item.parts,
    summaryKey: SUMMARY_KEY_BY_NAME[item.name],
    emphasis: EMPHASIS_BY_NAME[item.name] ?? "standard",
    preview: PREVIEW_BY_NAME[item.name],
  }));
}

export function getComponentGroups(): ComponentGroup[] {
  return [
    {
      id: "foundation",
      titleKey: "settingsPanel.gallery.groups.foundation",
      descriptionKey: "settingsPanel.gallery.groupDescriptions.foundation",
      items: toRegistrations(P0_BASE_INTERACTIVE_COMPONENTS),
    },
    {
      id: "forms",
      titleKey: "settingsPanel.gallery.groups.forms",
      descriptionKey: "settingsPanel.gallery.groupDescriptions.forms",
      items: toRegistrations(P0_DATA_FORM_COMPONENTS),
    },
    {
      id: "advanced-data",
      titleKey: "settingsPanel.gallery.groups.advancedData",
      descriptionKey: "settingsPanel.gallery.groupDescriptions.advancedData",
      items: toRegistrations(STAGE7_DATA_ADVANCED_COMPONENTS),
    },
    {
      id: "workbench",
      titleKey: "settingsPanel.gallery.groups.workbench",
      descriptionKey: "settingsPanel.gallery.groupDescriptions.workbench",
      items: toRegistrations(STAGE7_WORKBENCH_COMPONENTS),
    },
    {
      id: "system-ux",
      titleKey: "settingsPanel.gallery.groups.systemUx",
      descriptionKey: "settingsPanel.gallery.groupDescriptions.systemUx",
      items: toRegistrations(STAGE8_SYSTEM_UX_COMPONENTS),
    },
  ];
}

[bash -lc cat > Chips-EcoSettingsPanel/src/features/component-gallery/ComponentGalleryPage.tsx <<'EOF'
import React from "react";
import { ChipsCardShell } from "@chips/component-library";
import { useI18n } from "../../app/providers/I18nProvider";
import { useRuntimeContext } from "../../app/providers/RuntimeProvider";
import { PageFrame } from "../../shared/ui/PageFrame";
import { getComponentGroups } from "./registry";

function getGalleryCardClassName(emphasis: "hero" | "wide" | "standard"): string {
  if (emphasis === "hero") {
    return "gallery-card gallery-card--hero";
  }
  if (emphasis === "wide") {
    return "gallery-card gallery-card--wide";
  }
  return "gallery-card";
}

export function ComponentGalleryPage(): React.ReactElement {
  const { t } = useI18n();
  const { currentTheme } = useRuntimeContext();
  const groups = React.useMemo(() => getComponentGroups(), []);

  return (
    <PageFrame
      title={t("settingsPanel.gallery.title")}
      subtitle={t("settingsPanel.gallery.subtitle", {
        theme: currentTheme?.displayName ?? t("settingsPanel.common.notAvailable"),
      })}
    >
      <div className="gallery-page">
        <div className="gallery-header-note">{t("settingsPanel.gallery.description")}</div>
        {groups.map((group) => (
          <section key={group.id} className="gallery-section" aria-labelledby={`gallery-section-${group.id}`}>
            <header className="gallery-section__header">
              <div>
                <h2 id={`gallery-section-${group.id}`} className="gallery-section__title">
                  {t(group.titleKey)}
                </h2>
                <p className="gallery-section__description">{t(group.descriptionKey)}</p>
              </div>
              <span className="gallery-section__meta">
                {t("settingsPanel.gallery.sectionCount", { count: group.items.length })}
              </span>
            </header>
            <div className="gallery-bento-grid">
              {group.items.map((item) => {
                const Preview = item.preview;
                return (
                  <article key={item.name} className={getGalleryCardClassName(item.emphasis)}>
                    <ChipsCardShell
                      title={item.name}
                      toolbar={<span className="gallery-scope-tag">{item.scope}</span>}
                      footer={<div className="gallery-parts">{item.parts.join(" · ")}</div>}
                    >
                      <p className="gallery-card__summary">{t(item.summaryKey)}</p>
                      <Preview />
                    </ChipsCardShell>
                  </article>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </section>
        ))}
      </div>
    </PageFrame>
  );
}
EOF]

+  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-primary, #0a6cff) 10%, var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #ffffff) 90%);
+  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111) 72%, transparent);
+}
+
+.gallery-bento-grid {
   display: grid;
-  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
+  grid-template-columns: repeat(12, minmax(0, 1fr));
   gap: 16px;
+  grid-auto-flow: dense;
+}
+
+.gallery-card {
+  grid-column: span 4;
+  content-visibility: auto;
+  contain-intrinsic-size: 320px;
+}
+
+.gallery-card--wide {
+  grid-column: span 6;
+}
+
+.gallery-card--hero {
+  grid-column: span 8;
+}
+
+.gallery-card__summary {
+  margin: 0 0 14px;
+  font-size: 13px;
+  line-height: 1.7;
+  color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-on-surface, #111111) 72%, transparent);
 }
 
 .gallery-preview {
   display: grid;
@@
   min-height: 84px;
   border-radius: 16px;
   background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--chips-sys-color-surface, #ffffff) 90%, transparent);
 }
 
 @media (max-width: 920px) {
@@
   .settings-sidebar__nav {
     grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
   }
+
+  .gallery-bento-grid {
+    grid-template-columns: repeat(6, minmax(0, 1fr));
+  }
+
+  .gallery-card,
+  .gallery-card--wide,
+  .gallery-card--hero {
+    grid-column: span 3;
+  }
 }
 
 @media (max-width: 640px) {
@@
   .search-field {
     width: 100%;
   }
+
+  .gallery-section__header {
+    flex-direction: column;
+    align-items: stretch;
+  }
+
+  .gallery-bento-grid {
+    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
+  }
+
+  .gallery-card,
+  .gallery-card--wide,
+  .gallery-card--hero {
+    grid-column: span 1;
+  }
 }

+import React from "react";

+    return {
+      t(key: string, params?: Record<string, string | number>) {
+        if (!params) {
+          return key;
+        }
+        return `${key}:${JSON.stringify(params)}`;
+      },
+    };
+  },
+}));

**Update: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EcoSettingsPanel/技术文档/02-信息架构与交互流程设计.md`**

```diff
@@
 ## 5. 组件展示页布局
 
 组件展示页采用 Bento 布局，遵循以下原则：
@@
 - 高优先级组件使用更大卡片面积，便于对比主题效果。
 - 同类组件集中在同一视觉分组中，避免随机堆砌。
 - 每个卡片展示组件名称、用途、关键状态样例。
 - 页面应覆盖明确信息层级：基础交互、表单数据、高级数据、工作台系统体验。
+
+当前实现约束：
+
+- 页面按正式组件分组生成多个 `gallery-section` 区块，不再使用 Tab 切换隐藏其余分组。
+- 每个组件卡片都包含组件名、scope、parts、用途摘要和真实预览内容。
+- 卡片尺寸通过 `hero / wide / standard` 三种强调级别控制，形成稳定的 Bento 信息密度。
+- 预览文案全部进入本地 i18n 资源，避免展示页成为未国际化的“演示孤岛”。
```

```diff
@@
 ### FR-APPPLUGIN-001 列表展示
 
 - 页面展示所有已安装 `type: app` 插件的列表。
 - 列表项至少包含：名称、插件 ID、版本、启用状态、安装时间。
-- 系统自身设置面板插件若出现在列表中，必须按正式规则决定是否允许卸载/停用，并在文档中写清楚限制。
+- 系统自身设置面板插件若出现在列表中，首版正式规则为“不允许在自身界面中停用或卸载”，并在界面和文档中明确标识该限制。
@@
 ## 6. 通用交互要求
 
 - 左侧菜单切换不能造成整个应用刷新或丢失当前运行时状态。
+- 窄屏场景必须提供正式菜单切换控件；首版允许采用顶部切换器，不允许仅依赖被压缩的桌面侧边栏。
 - 所有 destructive 操作必须有明确确认或风险提示。
 - 异步处理中需呈现加载态，防止重复提交。
 - 空列表、错误态、权限不足、文件格式错误等场景必须有正式 UI 与可读提示。
```

**Update: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f/Chips-EcoSettingsPanel/技术文档/02-信息架构与交互流程设计.md`**

```diff
@@
 ## 4. 应用插件流程
 
 1. 页面进入时读取全部应用插件运行时记录。
 2. 用户选择文件或拖拽安装插件。
 3. 页面根据插件启用状态渲染“启用”或“停用”动作。
-4. 卸载前弹出确认，处理完成后刷新列表。
+4. 若列表项是当前设置面板自身插件，则停用和卸载动作必须被正式阻断，并显示限制说明。
+5. 其他插件卸载前弹出确认，处理完成后刷新列表。
@@
 ## 6. 响应式策略
 
 - 桌面宽屏：左侧菜单固定，右侧内容自适应。
 - 中等宽度：保持左右布局，但允许右侧卡片布局自动换列。
-- 窄屏场景：菜单折叠为顶部切换器或抽屉；该策略必须提前在架构上预留，不允许后续强行推翻页面结构。
+- 窄屏场景：菜单折叠为顶部切换器或抽屉；当前首版已采用顶部切换器，桌面侧边栏导航在窄屏下隐藏。
```

 export function useHostRefresh(eventNames: string[], refresh: () => Promise<void>): void {
   const { client } = useRuntimeContext();
   const eventKey = React.useMemo(() => eventNames.join("|"), [eventNames]);
+  const stableEventNames = React.useMemo(() => [...eventNames], [eventKey]);
+  const refreshRef = React.useRef(refresh);
+
+  React.useEffect(() => {
+    refreshRef.current = refresh;

+// @vitest-environment jsdom
+
+import React from "react";
+import { createRoot, type Root } from "react-dom/client";
+import { act } from "react-dom/test-utils";
+import { afterEach, beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from "vitest";
+import { useThemeGovernance } from "../../src/features/themes/useThemeGovernance";
+import { useLanguageGovernance } from "../../src/features/languages/useLanguageGovernance";
+import { useAppPluginGovernance } from "../../src/features/app-plugins/useAppPluginGovernance";
+import { useHostRefresh } from "../../src/shared/hooks/useHostRefresh";
+
+type EventHandler = (payload?: unknown) => void | Promise<void>;
+
+const eventHandlers = new Map<string, EventHandler[]>();
+
+let runtimeContextMock = createRuntimeContextMock();
+let i18nMock = createI18nMock();
+let serviceMock = createServiceMock();
+
+vi.mock("../../src/app/providers/RuntimeProvider", () => ({
+  useRuntimeContext() {
+    return runtimeContextMock;
+  },
+}));
+
+vi.mock("../../src/app/providers/I18nProvider", () => ({
+  useI18n() {
+    return i18nMock;
+  },
+}));
+
+vi.mock("../../src/shared/runtime/settings-runtime-service", () => ({
+  getSettingsRuntimeService() {
+    return serviceMock;
+  },
+}));
+
+function createRuntimeContextMock() {
+  return {
+    client: {
+      events: {
+        on: vi.fn((eventName: string, handler: EventHandler) => {
+          const handlers = eventHandlers.get(eventName) ?? [];
+          handlers.push(handler);
+          eventHandlers.set(eventName, handlers);
+          return () => {
+            const currentHandlers = eventHandlers.get(eventName) ?? [];
+            eventHandlers.set(
+              eventName,
+              currentHandlers.filter((currentHandler) => currentHandler !== handler),
+            );
+          };
+        }),
+      },
+    },
+    eventSource: {
+      subscribe() {
+        return () => undefined;
+      },
+    },
+    currentTheme: null,
+    currentLocale: "zh-CN",
+    ready: true,
+    runtimeError: null,
+    refreshRuntimeState: async () => undefined,
+  };
+}
+
+function createI18nMock() {
+  return {
+    locale: "zh-CN",
+    t(key: string, params?: Record<string, string | number>) {
+      if (!params) {
+        return key;
+      }
+      return `${key}:${JSON.stringify(params)}`;
+    },
+  };
+}
+
+function createServiceMock() {
+  return {
+    listThemes: vi.fn(),
+    installTheme: vi.fn(),
+    applyTheme: vi.fn(),
+    uninstallPlugin: vi.fn(),
+    listLanguages: vi.fn(),
+    setCurrentLocale: vi.fn(),
+    listAppPlugins: vi.fn(),
+    installAppPlugin: vi.fn(),
+    enablePlugin: vi.fn(),
+    disablePlugin: vi.fn(),
+    openPluginFileDialog: vi.fn(),
+    getPathForFile: vi.fn(),
+    showConfirm: vi.fn(),
+    showMessage: vi.fn(),
+  };
+}
+
+function resetHarnessMocks(): void {
+  eventHandlers.clear();
+  runtimeContextMock = createRuntimeContextMock();
+  i18nMock = createI18nMock();
+  serviceMock = createServiceMock();
+}
+
+async function flushReact(): Promise<void> {
+  await Promise.resolve();
+  await Promise.resolve();
+}
+
+async function emitEvent(eventName: string, payload?: unknown): Promise<void> {
+  await act(async () => {
+    const handlers = [...(eventHandlers.get(eventName) ?? [])];
+    for (const handler of handlers) {
+      await handler(payload);
+    }
+    await flushReact();
+  });
+}
+
+function createRenderer() {
+  const container = document.createElement("div");
+  document.body.appendChild(container);
+  const root = createRoot(container);
+
+  return {
+    async render(element: React.ReactElement): Promise<void> {
+      await act(async () => {
+        root.render(element);
+        await flushReact();
+      });
+    },
+    unmount(): void {
+      act(() => {
+        root.unmount();
+      });
+      container.remove();
+    },
+  };
+}
+
+describe("runtime hooks", () => {
+  let renderer: ReturnType<typeof createRenderer> | null = null;
+
+  beforeEach(() => {
+    resetHarnessMocks();
+  });
+
+  afterEach(() => {
+    renderer?.unmount();
+    renderer = null;
+    vi.clearAllMocks();
+  });
+
+  it("keeps host refresh subscriptions stable across rerenders and still calls the latest refresh handler", async () => {
+    const refreshLabels: string[] = [];
+
+    function Harness({ label }: { label: string }) {
+      const refresh = React.useCallback(async () => {
+        refreshLabels.push(label);
+      }, [label]);
+
+      useHostRefresh(["theme.changed", "plugin.installed"], refresh);
+      return <div>{label}</div>;
+    }
+
+    renderer = createRenderer();
+    await renderer.render(<Harness label="first" />);
+
+    expect(runtimeContextMock.client.events.on).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2);
+
+    await renderer.render(<Harness label="second" />);
+
+    expect(runtimeContextMock.client.events.on).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2);
+
+    await emitEvent("theme.changed");
+
+    expect(refreshLabels).toEqual(["second"]);
+  });
+
+  it("refreshes theme governance state when Host emits theme.changed", async () => {
+    serviceMock.listThemes
+      .mockResolvedValueOnce([
+        {
+          pluginId: "theme.before",
+          themeId: "theme.before",
+          displayName: "Before Theme",
+          version: "1.0.0",
+          installed: true,
+          enabled: true,
+          current: true,
+          installPath: "/themes/before",
+          installedAt: 1,
+          isDefault: false,
+        },
+      ])
+      .mockResolvedValueOnce([
+        {
+          pluginId: "theme.after",
+          themeId: "theme.after",
+          displayName: "After Theme",
+          version: "2.0.0",
+          installed: true,
+          enabled: true,
+          current: true,
+          installPath: "/themes/after",
+          installedAt: 2,
+          isDefault: false,
+        },
+      ]);
+
+    let latestState: ReturnType<typeof useThemeGovernance> | null = null;
+
+    function Harness() {
+      latestState = useThemeGovernance();
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    renderer = createRenderer();
+    await renderer.render(<Harness />);
+
+    expect(serviceMock.listThemes).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);
+    expect(latestState?.themes.map((theme) => theme.themeId)).toEqual(["theme.before"]);
+
+    await emitEvent("theme.changed");
+
+    expect(serviceMock.listThemes).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2);
+    expect(latestState?.themes.map((theme) => theme.themeId)).toEqual(["theme.after"]);
+  });
+
+  it("refreshes language governance state when Host emits language.changed", async () => {
+    serviceMock.listLanguages
+      .mockResolvedValueOnce([
+        { locale: "zh-CN", displayName: "中文", nativeName: "中文", current: true },
+        { locale: "en-US", displayName: "英文", nativeName: "English", current: false },
+      ])
+      .mockResolvedValueOnce([
+        { locale: "zh-CN", displayName: "中文", nativeName: "中文", current: false },
+        { locale: "en-US", displayName: "英文", nativeName: "English", current: true },
+      ]);
+
+    let latestState: ReturnType<typeof useLanguageGovernance> | null = null;
+
+    function Harness() {
+      latestState = useLanguageGovernance();
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    renderer = createRenderer();
+    await renderer.render(<Harness />);
+
+    expect(serviceMock.listLanguages).toHaveBeenCalledWith("zh-CN");
+    expect(latestState?.languages.find((language) => language.locale === "zh-CN")?.current).toBe(true);
+
+    await emitEvent("language.changed", { locale: "en-US" });
+
+    expect(serviceMock.listLanguages).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2);
+    expect(latestState?.languages.find((language) => language.locale === "en-US")?.current).toBe(true);
+  });
+
+  it("refreshes app plugin governance state when Host emits plugin.disabled", async () => {
+    serviceMock.listAppPlugins
+      .mockResolvedValueOnce([
+        {
+          pluginId: "plugin.example",
+          name: "Example Plugin",
+          description: "Enabled",
+          version: "1.0.0",
+          enabled: true,
+          selfManaged: false,
+          installPath: "/plugins/example",
+          installedAt: 1,
+          capabilities: ["demo"],
+        },
+      ])
+      .mockResolvedValueOnce([
+        {
+          pluginId: "plugin.example",
+          name: "Example Plugin",
+          description: "Disabled",
+          version: "1.0.0",
+          enabled: false,
+          selfManaged: false,
+          installPath: "/plugins/example",
+          installedAt: 1,
+          capabilities: ["demo"],
+        },
+      ]);
+
+    let latestState: ReturnType<typeof useAppPluginGovernance> | null = null;
+
+    function Harness() {
+      latestState = useAppPluginGovernance();
+      return null;
+    }
+
+    renderer = createRenderer();
+    await renderer.render(<Harness />);
+
+    expect(serviceMock.listAppPlugins).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);
+    expect(latestState?.plugins[0]?.enabled).toBe(true);
+
+    await emitEvent("plugin.disabled", { pluginId: "plugin.example" });
+
+    expect(serviceMock.listAppPlugins).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2);
+    expect(latestState?.plugins[0]?.enabled).toBe(false);
+  });
+});

```diff
@@
 | 主题管理 | `plugin.query({ type: 'theme' })`、`theme.list()`、`theme.getCurrent()` | `plugin.install()`、`theme.apply()`、`plugin.uninstall()` | `theme.changed`、`plugin.installed`、`plugin.uninstalled` |
 | 多语言 | `i18n.getCurrent()`、`i18n.listLocales()` | `i18n.setCurrent()` | `language.changed` |
 | 应用插件 | `plugin.query({ type: 'app' })` | `plugin.install()`、`plugin.enable()`、`plugin.disable()`、`plugin.uninstall()` | `plugin.installed`、`plugin.enabled`、`plugin.disabled`、`plugin.uninstalled` |
 | 组件展示 | 组件库导出清单、`theme.getCurrent()`、必要时 `theme.contract.get()` | 无 | `theme.changed` |
@@
 当前实现约束：
 
 - 页面级刷新统一走 `useHostRefresh()`
 - 主题页监听：`theme.changed`、`plugin.installed`、`plugin.uninstalled`
 - 语言页监听：`language.changed`
 - 应用插件页监听：`plugin.installed`、`plugin.enabled`、`plugin.disabled`、`plugin.uninstalled`
 - `useHostRefresh()` 内部使用稳定事件名快照与最新回调引用，避免组件重渲染时重复拆装同一组 Host 订阅，同时保证事件到达时始终执行最新刷新逻辑
+- 当前设置面板插件的“不可停用 / 不可卸载”限制同时存在于页面按钮层和 `useAppPluginGovernance()` 动作层，避免仅靠 UI 禁用造成结构性绕过
```

+# 交付前检查与人工验收清单
+
+## 1. 当前状态
+
+- 分支：`codex/ecosettings-panel-bootstrap-docs`
+- 当前策略：只继续检查、补文档和修正剩余问题，不合并到 `Develop`，等待人工审核后再执行合并
+- 首版范围：主题管理、多语言、应用插件、组件展示四个一级菜单
+
+## 2. 已完成的自动化检查
+
+已在 2026-03-11 执行并通过：
+
+1. `npm --workspace Chips-EcoSettingsPanel run lint`
+2. `npm --workspace Chips-EcoSettingsPanel run typecheck`
+3. `npm --workspace Chips-EcoSettingsPanel test`
+4. `npm --workspace Chips-EcoSettingsPanel run build`
+5. `npm --workspace Chips-EcoSettingsPanel run validate`
+6. `npm --workspace Chips-EcoSettingsPanel run verify`
+
+当前自动化测试覆盖重点：
+
+- 菜单注册与桌面/窄屏导航结构
+- 主题、多语言、应用插件运行时映射
+- 组件展示页分组与 Bento 布局渲染
+- Host 事件驱动刷新
+- 当前设置面板插件自保护规则
+
+## 3. 本轮额外收口结论
+
+- `useHostRefresh()` 已收口为稳定订阅实现，避免重渲染时重复拆装同组 Host 事件监听
+- 当前设置面板插件的“不可停用 / 不可卸载”限制已下沉到 hook 动作层，避免后续 UI 复用绕过治理规则
+- 当前未发现新的生态契约缺口，因此未新增问题工单
+
+## 4. 待人工审核的 Host 联调清单
+
+以下项目需要在真实 Host 开发态人工确认：
+
+1. 打开应用窗口后，左侧菜单与顶部窄屏切换器都能正常工作
+2. 主题安装、切换、卸载链路完整，且 `theme.changed` 后界面立即刷新
+3. 语言切换后，界面文案与当前语言标识立即刷新
+4. 应用插件安装、启用、停用、卸载链路完整
+5. 当前设置面板插件在自身界面中无法停用或卸载
+6. 组件展示页随主题切换呈现真实组件库主题效果
+7. 文件选择、拖拽安装、空状态、错误态、确认弹窗均符合正式交互要求
+
+## 5. 合并前约束
+
+- 未经人工审核，不执行分支合并
+- 若人工联调发现生态缺口，必须先补工单，再决定是否继续推进
+- 若人工联调仅发现本项目实现问题，可直接在当前分支继续修正并复跑全量验证
```

```diff
+import React from "react";
+
+interface GovernanceListColumn {
+  id: string;
+  label: string;
+  width: string;
+  align?: "start" | "end";
+}
+
+interface GovernanceListProps {
+  ariaLabel: string;
+  columns: GovernanceListColumn[];
+  children: React.ReactNode;
+}
+
+interface GovernanceListRowProps {
+  children: React.ReactNode;
+}
+
+interface GovernanceListCellProps {
+  label: string;
+  align?: "start" | "end";
+  children: React.ReactNode;
+}
+
+export function GovernanceList({ ariaLabel, columns, children }: GovernanceListProps): React.ReactElement {
+  const style = React.useMemo(() => {
+    return {
+      "--governance-list-columns": columns.map((column) => column.width).join(" "),
+    } as React.CSSProperties;
+  }, [columns]);
+
+  return (
+    <section className="governance-list" aria-label={ariaLabel} style={style}>
+      <div className="governance-list__header" role="presentation">
+        {columns.map((column) => (
+          <div
+            key={column.id}
+            className={`governance-list__header-cell${column.align === "end" ? " governance-list__header-cell--end" : ""}`}
+          >
+            {column.label}
+          </div>
+        ))}
+      </div>
+      <div className="governance-list__body">{children}</div>
+    </section>
+  );
+}
+
+export function GovernanceListRow({ children }: GovernanceListRowProps): React.ReactElement {
+  return <div className="governance-list__row">{children}</div>;
+}
+
+export function GovernanceListCell({ label, align = "start", children }: GovernanceListCellProps): React.ReactElement {
+  return (
+    <div className={`governance-list__cell${align === "end" ? " governance-list__cell--end" : ""}`} data-label={label}>
+      {children}
+    </div>
+  );
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

+import React from "react";
+import { ChipsDialog } from "@chips/component-library";
+import { useI18n } from "../../app/providers/I18nProvider";
+
+export interface DetailField {
+  label: string;
+  value: React.ReactNode;
+}
+
+interface RecordDetailDialogProps {
+  triggerLabel: string;
+  title: string;
+  description: string;
+  fields: DetailField[];
+}
+
+export function RecordDetailDialog({
+  triggerLabel,
+  title,
+  description,
+  fields,
+}: RecordDetailDialogProps): React.ReactElement {
+  const { t } = useI18n();
+
+  return (
+    <ChipsDialog
+      triggerContent={triggerLabel}
+      title={title}
+      description={description}
+      closeButtonLabel={t("settingsPanel.common.close")}
+    >
+      <dl className="detail-field-list">
+        {fields.map((field) => (
+          <div key={field.label} className="detail-field-list__item">
+            <dt>{field.label}</dt>
+            <dd>{field.value}</dd>
+          </div>
+        ))}
+      </dl>
+    </ChipsDialog>
+  );
+}
```
</details></tool-use>

```diff
+import React from "react";
+import { ChipsButton, ChipsEmptyState } from "@chips/component-library";
+import { useI18n } from "../../app/providers/I18nProvider";
+import { DropZone } from "../../shared/ui/DropZone";
+import { GovernanceList, GovernanceListCell, GovernanceListRow } from "../../shared/ui/GovernanceList";
+import { NotificationStack } from "../../shared/ui/NotificationStack";
+import { PageFrame } from "../../shared/ui/PageFrame";
+import { RecordDetailDialog } from "../../shared/ui/RecordDetailDialog";
+import { SearchField } from "../../shared/ui/SearchField";
+import { SectionStateBoundary } from "../../shared/ui/SectionStateBoundary";
+import { StatusBadge } from "../../shared/ui/StatusBadge";
+import { useThemeGovernance } from "./useThemeGovernance";
+
+export function ThemePage(): React.ReactElement {
+  const { t } = useI18n();
+  const {
+    themes,
+    loading,
+    error,
+    searchTerm,
+    setSearchTerm,
+    activeActionId,
+    installWithFilePicker,
+    installFromDroppedFiles,
+    applyTheme,
+    uninstallTheme,
+    refresh,
+    feedback,
+    dismissFeedback,
+    dropActive,
+    setDropActive,
+  } = useThemeGovernance();
+
+  return (
+    <PageFrame
+      title={t("settingsPanel.themes.title")}
+      subtitle={t("settingsPanel.themes.subtitle")}
+      actions={<ChipsButton onPress={installWithFilePicker}>{t("settingsPanel.themes.actions.install")}</ChipsButton>}
+    >
+      <NotificationStack
+        ariaLabel={t("settingsPanel.feedback.ariaLabel")}
+        items={feedback}
+        onDismiss={(item) => dismissFeedback(item.id)}
+      />
+      <div className="control-bar">
+        <SearchField
+          value={searchTerm}
+          placeholder={t("settingsPanel.themes.searchPlaceholder")}
+          onChange={setSearchTerm}
+        />
+      </div>
+      <div onDragEnter={() => setDropActive(true)} onDragLeave={() => setDropActive(false)}>
+        <DropZone
+          title={t("settingsPanel.themes.dropzone.title")}
+          description={t("settingsPanel.themes.dropzone.description")}
+          active={dropActive}
+          onDropFiles={installFromDroppedFiles}
+        />
+      </div>
+      <SectionStateBoundary
+        loading={loading}
+        error={error}
+        loadingLabel={t("settingsPanel.themes.loading")}
+        onRetry={() => {
+          void refresh();
+        }}
+      >
+        {themes.length === 0 ? (
+          <ChipsEmptyState
+            ariaLabel={t("settingsPanel.themes.empty.ariaLabel")}
+            title={t("settingsPanel.themes.empty.title")}
+            description={t("settingsPanel.themes.empty.description")}
+            actionLabel={t("settingsPanel.themes.actions.install")}
+            onAction={installWithFilePicker}
+          />
+        ) : (
+          <GovernanceList
+            ariaLabel={t("settingsPanel.themes.listAriaLabel")}
+            columns={[
+              { id: "theme", label: t("settingsPanel.themes.columns.theme"), width: "minmax(0, 2.6fr)" },
+              { id: "status", label: t("settingsPanel.themes.columns.status"), width: "minmax(0, 1.2fr)" },
+              { id: "meta", label: t("settingsPanel.themes.columns.meta"), width: "minmax(0, 1.8fr)" },
+              { id: "actions", label: t("settingsPanel.themes.columns.actions"), width: "auto", align: "end" },
+            ]}
+          >
+            {themes.map((theme) => {
+              const busy = activeActionId === theme.pluginId;
+
+              return (
+                <GovernanceListRow key={theme.pluginId}>
+                  <GovernanceListCell label={t("settingsPanel.themes.columns.theme")}>
+                    <div className="governance-item">
+                      <div className="governance-item__title">{theme.displayName}</div>
+                      <div className="governance-item__summary">{theme.themeId}</div>
+                    </div>
+                  </GovernanceListCell>
+                  <GovernanceListCell label={t("settingsPanel.themes.columns.status")}>
+                    <div className="governance-status">
+                      {theme.current ? (
+                        <StatusBadge tone="positive" label={t("settingsPanel.themes.badges.current")} />
+                      ) : null}
+                      {theme.enabled && !theme.current ? (
+                        <StatusBadge tone="attention" label={t("settingsPanel.themes.badges.enabled")} />
+                      ) : null}
+                      {theme.isDefault ? (
+                        <StatusBadge tone="neutral" label={t("settingsPanel.themes.badges.default")} />
+                      ) : null}
+                    </div>
+                  </GovernanceListCell>
+                  <GovernanceListCell label={t("settingsPanel.themes.columns.meta")}>
+                    <div className="governance-meta">
+                      <span>{t("settingsPanel.themes.fields.version")}: {theme.version}</span>
+                      <span>
+                        {t("settingsPanel.themes.fields.publisher")}: {theme.publisher ?? t("settingsPanel.common.notAvailable")}
+                      </span>
+                    </div>
+                  </GovernanceListCell>
+                  <GovernanceListCell label={t("settingsPanel.themes.columns.actions")} align="end">
+                    <div className="action-row action-row--tight">
+                      <RecordDetailDialog
+                        triggerLabel={t("settingsPanel.common.details")}
+                        title={t("settingsPanel.themes.dialogs.detailTitle", { name: theme.displayName })}
+                        description={t("settingsPanel.themes.dialogs.detailDescription")}
+                        fields={[
+                          { label: t("settingsPanel.themes.fields.themeId"), value: theme.themeId },
+                          { label: t("settingsPanel.themes.fields.version"), value: theme.version },
+                          {
+                            label: t("settingsPanel.themes.fields.publisher"),
+                            value: theme.publisher ?? t("settingsPanel.common.notAvailable"),
+                          },
+                          { label: t("settingsPanel.themes.fields.installPath"), value: theme.installPath },
+                        ]}
+                      />
+                      <ChipsButton disabled={busy || theme.current} onPress={() => void applyTheme(theme)}>
+                        {t("settingsPanel.themes.actions.apply")}
+                      </ChipsButton>
+                      <ChipsButton disabled={busy} onPress={() => void uninstallTheme(theme)}>
+                        {t("settingsPanel.themes.actions.uninstall")}
+                      </ChipsButton>
+                    </div>
+                  </GovernanceListCell>
+                </GovernanceListRow>
+              );
+            })}
+          </GovernanceList>
+        )}
+      </SectionStateBoundary>
+    </PageFrame>
+  );
+}

+import React from "react";
+import { ChipsButton, ChipsEmptyState } from "@chips/component-library";
+import { useI18n } from "../../app/providers/I18nProvider";
+import { GovernanceList, GovernanceListCell, GovernanceListRow } from "../../shared/ui/GovernanceList";
+import { NotificationStack } from "../../shared/ui/NotificationStack";
+import { PageFrame } from "../../shared/ui/PageFrame";
+import { RecordDetailDialog } from "../../shared/ui/RecordDetailDialog";
+import { SectionStateBoundary } from "../../shared/ui/SectionStateBoundary";
+import { StatusBadge } from "../../shared/ui/StatusBadge";
+import { useLanguageGovernance } from "./useLanguageGovernance";
+
+export function LanguagePage(): React.ReactElement {
+  const { t } = useI18n();
+  const { languages, loading, error, activeLocale, switchLocale, refresh, feedback, dismissFeedback } = useLanguageGovernance();
+
+  return (
+    <PageFrame title={t("settingsPanel.languages.title")} subtitle={t("settingsPanel.languages.subtitle")}>
+      <NotificationStack
+        ariaLabel={t("settingsPanel.feedback.ariaLabel")}
+        items={feedback}
+        onDismiss={(item) => dismissFeedback(item.id)}
+      />
+      <SectionStateBoundary
+        loading={loading}
+        error={error}
+        loadingLabel={t("settingsPanel.languages.loading")}
+        onRetry={() => {
+          void refresh();
+        }}
+      >
+        {languages.length === 0 ? (
+          <ChipsEmptyState
+            ariaLabel={t("settingsPanel.languages.empty.ariaLabel")}
+            title={t("settingsPanel.languages.empty.title")}
+            description={t("settingsPanel.languages.empty.description")}
+          />
+        ) : (
+          <GovernanceList
+            ariaLabel={t("settingsPanel.languages.listAriaLabel")}
+            columns={[
+              { id: "language", label: t("settingsPanel.languages.columns.language"), width: "minmax(0, 2.4fr)" },
+              { id: "status", label: t("settingsPanel.languages.columns.status"), width: "minmax(0, 1fr)" },
+              { id: "meta", label: t("settingsPanel.languages.columns.meta"), width: "minmax(0, 1.4fr)" },
+              { id: "actions", label: t("settingsPanel.languages.columns.actions"), width: "auto", align: "end" },
+            ]}
+          >
+            {languages.map((language) => {
+              const busy = activeLocale === language.locale;
+
+              return (
+                <GovernanceListRow key={language.locale}>
+                  <GovernanceListCell label={t("settingsPanel.languages.columns.language")}>
+                    <div className="governance-item">
+                      <div className="governance-item__title">{language.displayName}</div>
+                      <div className="governance-item__summary">{language.nativeName}</div>
+                    </div>
+                  </GovernanceListCell>
+                  <GovernanceListCell label={t("settingsPanel.languages.columns.status")}>
+                    <div className="governance-status">
+                      {language.current ? (
+                        <StatusBadge tone="positive" label={t("settingsPanel.languages.badges.current")} />
+                      ) : (
+                        <StatusBadge tone="neutral" label={t("settingsPanel.languages.badges.available")} />
+                      )}
+                    </div>
+                  </GovernanceListCell>
+                  <GovernanceListCell label={t("settingsPanel.languages.columns.meta")}>
+                    <div className="governance-meta">
+                      <span>{t("settingsPanel.languages.fields.locale")}: {language.locale}</span>
+                      <span>{t("settingsPanel.languages.fields.nativeName")}: {language.nativeName}</span>
+                    </div>
+                  </GovernanceListCell>
+                  <GovernanceListCell label={t("settingsPanel.languages.columns.actions")} align="end">
+                    <div className="action-row action-row--tight">
+                      <RecordDetailDialog
+                        triggerLabel={t("settingsPanel.common.details")}
+                        title={t("settingsPanel.languages.dialogs.detailTitle", { name: language.displayName })}
+                        description={t("settingsPanel.languages.dialogs.detailDescription")}
+                        fields={[
+                          { label: t("settingsPanel.languages.fields.locale"), value: language.locale },
+                          { label: t("settingsPanel.languages.fields.nativeName"), value: language.nativeName },
+                          { label: t("settingsPanel.languages.columns.status"), value: language.current ? t("settingsPanel.languages.badges.current") : t("settingsPanel.languages.badges.available") },
+                        ]}
+                      />
+                      <ChipsButton disabled={busy || language.current} onPress={() => void switchLocale(language.locale)}>
+                        {t("settingsPanel.languages.actions.apply")}
+                      </ChipsButton>
+                    </div>
+                  </GovernanceListCell>
+                </GovernanceListRow>
+              );
+            })}
+          </GovernanceList>
+        )}
+      </SectionStateBoundary>
+    </PageFrame>
+  );
+}
